mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schedule_attendance WHERE schedule_id = #{scheduleId} AND status = 'CONFIRMED' AND is_latest = 1
SELECT sa.*, u.nickname AS display_name FROM schedule_attendance sa JOIN `user` u ON u.user_key = sa.user_key WHERE sa.schedule_id = #{scheduleId} AND sa.is_latest = 1 ORDER BY sa.created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO schedule_attendance (schedule_id, user_key, status, actual_status, is_latest, updated_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{scheduleId}, #{userKey}, #{status}, #{actualStatus}, 1, #{updatedBy}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE schedule_attendance SET status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE attendance_id = #{attendanceId}

UPDATE schedule_attendance SET actual_status = #{actualStatus}, checked_by_user_key = #{updatedBy}, checked_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE attendance_id = #{attendanceId}
UPDATE schedule_attendance SET status = #{status}, processed_by_user_key = #{processedByUserKey}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE attendance_id = #{attendanceId}
